linting.notes: No linting tools configured. This is a configuration-only repository containing Tekton pipeline YAML files. No yamllint, pre-commit hooks, or other validation tools are present.

testing.notes: No test infrastructure exists. This is a configuration repository that stores Tekton/Konflux pipeline definitions for ODH components. There are no unit tests, integration tests, or any test framework.

advisory_checks.name: OKC Replicator
advisory_checks.command: Manual workflow_dispatch only - copies Tekton files to target repositories

ci.notes: The repository has a single GitHub Actions workflow 'okc-replicator.yml' that is manually triggered (workflow_dispatch). It copies Tekton configuration files from this central repository to target component repositories and updates version tags. This workflow does not perform any validation, linting, or testing - it only replicates configuration files.

build.notes: No build system. This repository contains only YAML configuration files that are used as-is. There are no dependencies to install and nothing to compile or build.

conventions.notes: This repository follows a simple directory structure: each ODH component has its own subdirectory (e.g., 'data-science-pipelines/', 'odh-dashboard/') containing a '.tekton/' folder with Tekton PipelineRun YAML files. Files are named with pattern '{component-name}-push.yaml'.

container_recipe.notes: No container validation performed. This is a configuration-only repository with no code to build or test. The only validation that could theoretically be performed is YAML syntax checking, but no such tooling is configured in the repository.

validation.summary: Validation skipped - no test or lint infrastructure present in repository

gaps: No linting tools configured (yamllint, pre-commit hooks, etc.)
No test infrastructure of any kind
No YAML schema validation for Tekton pipelines
No CI checks that validate YAML syntax or Tekton schema correctness
No automated validation of pull requests
Repository contains only configuration files - no executable code
The only GitHub Actions workflow is manually triggered and performs file replication without validation
